name: Spiced Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and peel the cucumbers.
2. Cut into slices, then smaller pieces.
3. Sprinkle with salt and mix well.
4. Let sit for 15 minutes to allow the salt to draw out moisture.
5. Rinse the cucumber pieces and dry them thoroughly.
6. Blend the cucumber until smooth, then add sesame seeds, sugar, soy sauce, hot soybean paste, and lemon juice.
7. Chill before serving.
